text: The White House accused China of “industrial-scale” theft of U.S. AI technology, warning it could raise tensions ahead of the planned summit between leaders. Michael Kratsios said the U.S. has evidence that “foreign entities, principally based in China, are engaged in deliberate, industrial-scale campaigns to distil US frontier AI systems.” Source: FT
text_zh: 白宫指责中国“工业规模”窃取美国人工智能技术，并警告称这可能会在领导人计划举行峰会前加剧紧张局势。迈克尔·克拉齐奥斯（Michael Kratsios）表示，美国有证据表明“主要位于中国的外国实体正在进行蓄意的、工业规模的活动，以窃取美国的前沿人工智能系统。”来源：金融时报

text: The U.S. Air Force plans to buy ~4,300 JASSM-ER stealth cruise missiles from Lockheed Martin over the next five years, aiming to rebuild depleted stockpiles after heavy use in recent operations. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 美国空军计划在未来五年内从洛克希德·马丁公司购买约4300枚JASSM-ER隐身巡航导弹，旨在补充近期行动中大量消耗后的库存。来源：彭博社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Air defence activity has stopped simultaneously" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Fars: Iranian air defence activity heard in Tehran and several other cities was triggered by the detection of micro-drones and small UAVs. Heightened alert levels during the ceasefire mean operators are responding quickly to any potential aerial threat, including small or unclear signals. Some of the sounds may also be linked to friendly aircraft, such as MiG-29 fighters conducting air surveillance as part of the capital’s defence network. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“防空活动已同时停止” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 法尔斯通讯社：在德黑兰和其他几个城市听到的伊朗防空活动是由探测到微型无人机和小型无人机引发的。停火期间的高度戒备意味着操作员会对任何潜在的空中威胁（包括小型或不明确的信号）做出快速反应。一些声音也可能与友军飞机有关，例如执行空中监视任务以作为首都防御网络一部分的米格-29战斗机。@wfwitness

text: Hungary’s Foreign Minister Péter Szijjártó blamed the election loss on “foreign interference,” claiming Ukraine turned Hungary into a “secret service operational field.”
text_zh: 匈牙利外交部长彼得·西雅尔多（Péter Szijjártó）将选举失利归咎于“外国干涉”，声称乌克兰将匈牙利变成了“情报行动场”。

text: Ukraine is now using P1-SUN interceptor drones launched from An-28 aircraft to counter incoming Russian Shahed drones.
text_zh: 乌克兰目前正在使用从安-28飞机上发射的P1-SUN拦截无人机来对抗来袭的俄罗斯“沙赫德”无人机。

text: NEW: Iran has laid new naval mines in the Strait of Hormuz. Shipping traffic has collapsed sharply. Source: Axios
text_zh: 最新消息：伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡布设了新的水雷。航运交通急剧萎缩。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "/21222" 🇮🇷 What Was Behind the Air Defense Sounds Over Tehran and Other Iranian Cities? According to Fars News correspondent sources, recent air defense system activations across Tehran and several other Iranian cities were triggered by the presence of small drones, including Orbiter-type ISTAR drones, detected at multiple locations nationwide. Military analyst Abdolreza Seddiq elaborated on four additional factors behind the activations during the ceasefire period: 1. Full combat readiness. During a ceasefire, air defense operators remain trigger-ready and are required to respond to any signal or light anomaly without hesitation. 2. MiG-29s in the defensive ring. As during wartime, MiG-29 fighters are integrated into Tehran's air defense perimeter for drone interception — aerial sounds from friendly jets reflect active air surveillance operations. 3. Maintenance and upgrades. The ceasefire window is being used to overhaul air defense systems, install new radars, and repair anti-aircraft guns — equipment testing is unavoidable during this process. 4. Shift to mosaic defense architecture. Iran is using the ceasefire to drill and consolidate a new air defense deployment model — transitioning from a centralized "spider" network system to a decentralized "mosaic" system operating locally and independently. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“/21222” 🇮🇷 德黑兰和其他伊朗城市上空的防空声音背后是什么？据法尔斯通讯社记者消息，德黑兰和其他几个伊朗城市最近的防空系统启动是由在全国多个地点探测到的小型无人机（包括轨道者型ISTAR无人机）引发的。军事分析家阿卜杜勒雷扎·塞迪克（Abdolreza Seddiq）详细阐述了停火期间防空系统启动背后的四个额外因素：1. 全面战斗准备。在停火期间，防空操作员保持随时待命状态，并被要求毫不犹豫地对任何信号或光异常做出反应。2. 防御圈中的米格-29。与战时一样，米格-29战斗机被整合到德黑兰的防空圈中用于拦截无人机——友军喷气式飞机的空中声音反映了积极的空中监视行动。3. 维护和升级。停火窗口期正被用于检修防空系统、安装新雷达和修理高射炮——在此过程中设备测试是不可避免的。4. 向马赛克防御架构转变。伊朗正在利用停火期间演练和巩固一种新的防空部署模式——从集中的“蜘蛛”网络系统过渡到在本地独立运行的去中心化“马赛克”系统。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The U.S. has used large amounts of missiles in the Iran war (1,000+ Tomahawks and thousands of air-defense interceptors), raising concerns it may struggle to fully execute a Taiwan defense scenario in the near term. Officials say restocking could take years (up to ~6), though the Pentagon and White House insist overall readiness remains sufficient. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 美国在伊朗战争中使用了大量导弹（1000多枚战斧导弹和数千枚防空拦截弹），引发了人们对其短期内可能难以完全执行台湾防御方案的担忧。官员们表示，补充库存可能需要数年时间（长达约6年），尽管五角大楼和白宫坚称整体战备状态仍然充足。来源：华尔街日报

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 Reports in Iran claim the recent activation of air defense systems in Tehran and several other cities was in response to micro drones and small UAVs, including Orbiter type drones detected in multiple areas. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报更新 🔴 伊朗方面的报道称，德黑兰和其他几个城市最近启动防空系统是为了应对微型无人机和小型无人机，包括在多个地区探测到的Orbiter型无人机。推文

text: Open Source Intel A man in Seattle found a young man on the ground after an apparent fentanyl overdose. He administered 3 doses of Narcan and revived him. I have a lot of questions. The main one is how did the U.S. reach a point where random people carry Narcan just in case? FYI, China is the main source of fentanyl precursor chemicals, gets sent to the cartels then they synthesize the finished fentanyl and smuggle it across the US southern border. Video credit on TT: @Gabethe4 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 西雅图一名男子在疑似芬太尼过量后发现一名年轻人倒在地上。他施用了3剂纳洛酮并将其救活。我有很多疑问。最主要的是，美国是如何走到这一步的，以至于普通人都要随身携带纳洛酮以防万一？供参考，中国是芬太尼前体化学品的主要来源，这些化学品被运往贩毒集团，然后由他们合成成品芬太尼，并将其走私越过美国南部边境。TikTok视频来源：@Gabethe4 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz USS George Bush reaches CENTCOM area of responsibility today Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) sails in the Indian Ocean in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility, April 23. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047375382135947468/photo/1 - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 乔治·布什号航空母舰今日抵达中央司令部责任区 尼米兹级航空母舰乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）于4月23日在印度洋美国中央司令部责任区航行。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047375382135947468/photo/1 - 美国中央司令部推文

text: OSINTtechnical A U.S. Navy sailor assigned to a minesweeper headed to the Middle East was medically evacuated after he was scratched by an Asian monkey while ashore in Thailand -Axios tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 一名被派往中东的扫雷舰上的美国海军水手在泰国上岸时被亚洲猴子抓伤，随后被医疗后送 - Axios 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : Why President Trump’s Naval Blockade Is Doing What 40 Years of Sanctions Could Not Iran’s annual government budget sits around $56 billion. The U.S. federal budget exceeds $7 trillion, making the U.S. budget roughly 125 times larger (or about 12,400% bigger). If the U.S. naval blockade continues on Iran for 2-3 months, the loss for Iran would be the size of their annual budget. When does it get very serious? Weeks to months. 2 to 4 weeks: Full oil export halt, faster rial collapse, worsening food shortages, growing government salary delays. 1 to 2 months: Reserves heavily depleted, hyperinflation surges, wider industrial shutdowns, protests more likely. 2.5 to 3+ months: Losses near the full $56 billion annual budget, risk of government breakdown and widespread unrest. Important caveats: • Iran has buffers such as reserves, land routes, China trade, and shadow fleet tactics that may extend resilience. • Losses are not linear. Military and security forces would likely be prioritized for payment first. • Hyperinflation and protests would likely emerge before full fiscal collapse. • The real impact depends heavily on how strictly the blockade is enforced. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 转发 @Osint613 ：为什么特朗普总统的海军封锁能做到40年的制裁都做不到的事 伊朗的年度政府预算约为560亿美元。美国联邦预算超过7万亿美元，使美国预算规模大约是其125倍（或大出约12,400%）。如果美国对伊朗的海军封锁持续2-3个月，伊朗的损失将相当于其年度预算规模。什么时候会变得非常严重？几周到几个月。2到4周：石油出口全面停止，里亚尔加速崩溃，食品短缺加剧，政府工资发放延迟日益严重。1到2个月：储备严重枯竭，恶性通货膨胀飙升，工业大范围停工，抗议活动更有可能发生。2.5到3个月以上：损失接近560亿美元的年度预算总额，存在政府崩溃和大规模动荡的风险。重要注意事项：• 伊朗拥有储备、陆路路线、对华贸易和影子船队策略等缓冲手段，可能会延长其韧性。• 损失不是线性的。军事和安全部队可能会被优先支付工资。• 恶性通货膨胀和抗议活动很可能会在财政完全崩溃之前出现。• 实际影响在很大程度上取决于封锁执行的严格程度。推文

text: Open Source Intel Atlantic writer: Ghalibaf has not been removed from the negotiating team by the IRGC, and claims from Israel’s Channel 12 are false. Conflicting reports from channel 12 and the Atlantic We will get confirmation one way or another soon. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf has resigned from the negotiating team. - N12 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047363205740028034/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 大西洋月刊撰稿人：卡利巴夫并未被伊斯兰革命卫队从谈判小组中除名，以色列第12频道声称的消息不实。来自第12频道和大西洋月刊的报道相互矛盾，我们很快会以某种方式得到证实。突发 🔴 🔴 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫已辞去谈判小组成员职务。 - N12 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047363205740028034/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 Kan : A Lebanese political source from the anti-Hezbollah camp says that repealing the law banning ties with Israel is premature, and should only happen after progress in negotiations. The source added that even if a ceasefire is extended, advancing negotiations will be difficult without a joint effort to disarm Hezbollah, especially as the group is already working to disrupt progress. Regionally, Gulf states support Beirut’s approach, though Saudi Arabia is seen balancing its backing of the government with increased contacts with Nabih Berri to maintain stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 Kan ：一位来自反真主党阵营的黎巴嫩政治消息人士称，废除禁止与以色列建立联系的法律为时尚早，只有在谈判取得进展后才应进行。该消息人士补充说，即使停火协议延长，如果不共同努力解除真主党的武装，推进谈判也将十分困难，尤其是该组织已经在努力破坏进展。在区域层面上，海湾国家支持贝鲁特的方针，尽管沙特阿拉伯被认为在支持政府与加强与纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）的接触之间寻求平衡，以维持稳定。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ТУРАНАРЬ: 📝 За укрепление сотрудничества 📝 О встрече Жапарова с Путиным Анонсированная ранее встреча состоялась в Москве: президент России Владимир Путин провёл переговоры с киргизским коллегой Садыром Жапаровым в Кремле. Официальную тему переговоров не раскрывают. По пресс-релизу стороны уделили внимание торгово‑экономическим проектам и согласованию инициатив в стратегическом партнерстве. В ноябре 2025 года Путин и Жапаров подписали совместное заявление об углублении союзничества и стратегического партнерства, а также ряд документов по расширению двусторонних связей на перспективу. 🖍 Хоть и подробности остались в рамках официоза, однако встреча прошла на фоне одной важной детали: Евросоюз ввел новые санкции в отношении России, и в этот раз туда попала и Киргизия. 🚩 Киргизия стала первой страной, которая попала под прямые санкции Евросоюза из-за СВО. В республику теперь запрещен экспорт станков с числовым программным управлением и радиотехнического оборудования из Европы. 🏳️ Сделано это, как говорят в Европе, для предотвращения обхода Россией санкций через Киргизию. По информации ЕС, за первые 10 месяцев 2025 года импорт товаров двойного назначения из Европы в Киргизию вырос почти на 800% в сравнении с тем, что было до СВО. ❗️ Проведенная встреча между президентами получилась весьма символичной, задумывалось так или нет. Пока выводы делать рано, но полагаем, что подробности переговоров так или иначе появятся в сети. #Киргизия #Россия 🏹 @rybar_stan — о цене свободы для Средней Азии 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ТУРАНАРЬ： 📝 关于加强合作 📝 关于扎帕罗夫与普京的会晤 此前宣布的会晤在莫斯科举行：俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京在克里姆林宫与吉尔吉斯斯坦总统萨德尔·扎帕罗夫进行了会谈。会谈的官方主题未予披露。根据新闻稿，双方关注了经贸项目以及战略伙伴关系中倡议的协调。2025年11月，普京和扎帕罗夫签署了关于深化联盟关系和战略伙伴关系的联合声明，以及一系列关于扩大未来双边关系的文档。 🖍 虽然细节仍停留在官方层面，但会晤是在一个重要背景下进行的：欧盟对俄罗斯实施了新的制裁，而这一次吉尔吉斯斯坦也位列其中。 🚩 吉尔吉斯斯坦成为第一个因特别军事行动而受到欧盟直接制裁的国家。目前，禁止从欧洲向该共和国出口数控机床和无线电技术设备。 🏳️ 正如欧洲方面所言，此举是为了防止俄罗斯通过吉尔吉斯斯坦规避制裁。据欧盟信息，2025年前10个月，从欧洲进口到吉尔吉斯斯坦的两用商品较特别军事行动前增长了近800%。 ❗️ 两位总统举行的这次会晤显得非常有象征意义，无论是否刻意为之。现在下结论还为时过早，但我们相信谈判的细节迟早会出现在网络上。 #吉尔吉斯斯坦 #俄罗斯 🏹 @rybar_stan — 关于中亚自由的代价 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 WSJ: U.S. military involvement in the Middle East, particularly naval deployments, air assets, and munitions use, is straining resources that would be critical in a Taiwan scenario. War games have long shown that a conflict with China over Taiwan would already be highly costly, and the added burden of the Iran war is increasing concern about readiness. There are also worries about stockpiles, as sustained operations against Iran risk depleting precision weapons and air defence interceptors needed for a high-end conflict in the Indo-Pacific. Similar concerns have been raised within the Pentagon about overextended forces and limited munitions reserves. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 《华尔街日报》：美国在中东的军事介入，特别是海军部署、空中资产和弹药使用，正在消耗在台湾局势中至关重要的资源。兵棋推演早已表明，与中国在台湾问题上的冲突代价将极其高昂，而伊朗战争带来的额外负担加剧了人们对战备状态的担忧。此外，人们还担心库存问题，因为针对伊朗的持续行动可能会耗尽在印太地区高端冲突中所需的精确制导武器和防空拦截弹。五角大楼内部也提出了类似的担忧，认为部队过度扩张且弹药储备有限。@wfwitness

text: A U.S. Navy sailor assigned to the USS Chief, a minesweeping ship headed to the Strait of Hormuz, was medically evacuated after being scratched by a monkey during a stop in Phuket, Thailand. The sailor received treatment and was sent back to a base in Japan for further care. The Navy said the incident did not affect the mission, and the ship continued operations as planned. Source: Axios
text_zh: 一名隶属于“首席号”（USS Chief）扫雷舰的美国海军水兵在前往霍尔木兹海峡途中，于泰国普吉岛停留时被猴子抓伤，随后被医疗后送。该水兵接受了治疗，并被送回日本基地接受进一步护理。海军表示，此次事件未影响任务，该舰按计划继续执行任务。来源：Axios

text: 🇸🇾 Syrian dictator Al-Julani escort. None of these “jets” offered to protect Gaza. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇸🇾 叙利亚独裁者阿勒朱拉尼（Al-Julani）的护卫队。这些“喷气式飞机”中没有一架提出要保护加沙。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US President Donald Trump says he is “not anxious” to end the war with Iran, adding that “the clock is ticking” for Tehran. He claims Iran’s military capabilities have been severely degraded and that the blockade is “airtight and strong.” Trump says a deal will only be made when it is “appropriate and good” for the United States and its allies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他“并不急于”结束与伊朗的战争，并补充说德黑兰的“时间不多了”。他声称伊朗的军事能力已严重受损，封锁“严密且强大”。特朗普表示，只有在对美国及其盟友“合适且有利”时，才会达成协议。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Trump: ‘For those people, fewer in number now than ever before, that are reading The Failing New York Times, or watching Fake News CNN, that think that I am “anxious” to end the War (if you would even call it that!) with Iran, please be advised that I am possibly the least pressured person ever to be in this position. I have all the time in the World, but Iran doesn’t — The clock is ticking! The reason some of the Media is doing so poorly with Subscribers and Viewers is because they no longer have credibility. Iran’s Navy is lying at the bottom of the Sea, their Air Force is demolished, their Anti Aircraft and Radar Weaponry is gone, their leaders are no longer with us, the Blockade is airtight and strong and, from there, it only gets worse — Time is not on their side! A Deal will only be made when it’s appropriate and good for the United States of America, our Allies and, in fact, the rest of the World. President DONALD J. TRUMP’ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）特朗普：‘对于那些现在比以往任何时候都少、正在阅读《失败的纽约时报》或观看《假新闻CNN》的人，如果你们认为我“急于”结束与伊朗的战争（如果这也能叫战争的话！），请注意，我可能是历史上处于这个位置的人中压力最小的一个。我有的是时间，但伊朗没有——时间不多了！一些媒体之所以在订阅者和观众方面表现如此糟糕，是因为它们不再具有可信度。伊朗海军正躺在海底，他们的空军已被摧毁，他们的防空和雷达武器已不复存在，他们的领导人已不在我们身边，封锁严密且强大，而且情况只会变得更糟——时间不在他们那边！只有在对美利坚合众国、我们的盟友，实际上对世界其他地区都合适且有利时，才会达成协议。’ 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Trump: A Deal will only be made when it’s appropriate and good for the United States of America, our Allies and, in fact, the rest of the World. Trump: For those people, fewer in number now than ever before, that are reading The Failing New York Times, or watching Fake News CNN, that think that I am “anxious” to end the War (if you would even call it that! ) with Iran, please be advised that I am possibly the least pressured person ever to be in this position. I have all the time in the World, but Iran doesn’t — The clock is ticking! The reason some of the Media is doing so poorly with Subscribers and Viewers is because they no longer have credibility. Iran’s Navy is lying at the bottom of the Sea, their Air Force is demolished, their Anti Aircraft and Radar Weaponry is gone, their leaders are no longer with us, the Blockade is airtight and strong and, from there, it only gets worse — Time is not on their side! A Deal will only be made when it’s appropriate and good for the United States of America, our Allies and, in fact, the rest of the World. President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @DavidMakovsky : Israel’s Channel 13 military analyst @alonbd Alon Ben David just reported at start of prime time network news that Israel has received a major resupply of American weapons. Unclear from the report if this includes more interceptors. tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）转发 @DavidMakovsky：以色列第13频道军事分析师 @alonbd 阿隆·本·戴维刚刚在黄金时段新闻节目开始时报道称，以色列已收到大量美国武器补给。报告中不清楚这是否包括更多的拦截导弹。推文

Bush carrier strike group has entered the Central Command area of responsibility, becoming the third US aircraft carrier deployed in the Middle East region. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047380315811803479/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 快讯 | 美国海军“乔治·H·W·布什”号航母打击群已进入中央司令部责任区，成为部署在中东地区的第三艘美国航空母舰。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047380315811803479/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Lebanese political figure opposed to Hezbollah told Kan News repealing the law banning ties with Israel is premature and should only happen after progress in negotiations. President Joseph Aoun said any contact with Prime Minister Netanyahu is out of the question amid reports of U.S. efforts to broker talks. The source added that even if the ceasefire is extended, talks will struggle to advance without a joint Israeli Lebanese push to disarm Hezbollah, especially as Hezbollah is already trying to sabotage progress on the ground. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一位反对真主党的黎巴嫩政治人物告诉Kan新闻，废除禁止与以色列建立联系的法律还为时过早，只有在谈判取得进展后才应进行。约瑟夫·奥恩总统表示，在有报道称美国正努力斡旋谈判的情况下，与内塔尼亚胡总理进行任何接触都是不可能的。消息人士补充说，即使停火协议延长，如果没有以色列和黎巴嫩共同推动解除真主党武装，谈判也将难以推进，尤其是因为真主党已经在地面上试图破坏进展。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Israel and the U.S. are preparing for a possible renewal of fighting with Iran, even as efforts continue behind the scenes to arrange talks in Pakistan, Kan News reports. ➡️ Israeli officials are pessimistic about reaching a deal, citing Iran’s unwillingness to compromise on its nuclear program and rising tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. Israel has conveyed a message to Washington, “We are interested in renewing the campaign against Iran,” and is awaiting a decision from President Trump. An Israeli source said, “We are on immediate alert, awaiting President Trump’s decision.” See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 快讯 | Kan新闻报道，尽管幕后仍在努力安排在巴基斯坦进行谈判，但以色列和美国正在为可能重新爆发的与伊朗的战斗做准备。➡️ 以色列官员对达成协议持悲观态度，理由是伊朗不愿在核计划上妥协，且霍尔木兹海峡周边紧张局势加剧。以色列已向华盛顿传达了一个信息：“我们有兴趣重启针对伊朗的行动”，并正在等待特朗普总统的决定。一位以色列消息人士称：“我们处于紧急戒备状态，等待特朗普总统的决定。”与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Israeli official says Israel is not carrying out attacks in Iran, amidst reports of air defense activation גורם ביטחוני: ישראל לא תוקפת באיראן @ItayBlumental - כאן חדשות tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）以色列官员表示，在有防空系统启动的报道中，以色列并未对伊朗发动袭击。安全部门消息人士：以色列没有攻击伊朗 @ItayBlumental - כאן חדשות 推文

A woman had just approached him saying "we love you, please continue" before the man threw the paint. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047268131299533240/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran FM spokesman Esmail Baghaei: The claim that Iran is seeking "10 nuclear bombs" was never raised in negotiations. The figure reflects projections by other parties, not Iran's position. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗寻求“10枚核弹”的说法从未在谈判中提出。该数字反映了其他方的预测，而非伊朗的立场。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has announced that the Nimitz-class aircraft carrier, USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77), along with her Carrier Strike Group which all made the decision to sail around Africa from the Eastern Atlantic to avoid the Red Sea, has arrived in the Indian Ocean and is now operating within U.S. 5th Fleet Area-of-Responsibility. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）宣布，尼米兹级航空母舰“乔治·H·W·布什”号（CVN-77）及其航母打击群已抵达印度洋，目前正在美国第五舰队责任区内行动。此前他们决定从东大西洋绕行非洲以避开红海。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz I am receiving weekly messages asking me to vote for things or click on different links, by hacked accounts that are mostly spewing bitcoin slop. This has been ongoing for weeks now. FYI: The account of my colleague @ncitayim has been hacked. He is in the process of retrieving it. Until then, please don’t engage. Thank you! https://twitter.com/Bacharelhalabi/status/2047198163157516641/photo/1 - Bachar EL-Halabi | بشار الحلبي tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）我每周都会收到要求我投票或点击不同链接的信息，这些信息来自被黑的账户，大多在散布比特币垃圾信息。这种情况已经持续数周了。供参考：我的同事 @ncitayim 的账户已被黑。他正在尝试找回。在此之前，请不要与其互动。谢谢！https://twitter.com/Bacharelhalabi/status/2047198163157516641/photo/1 - Bachar EL-Halabi | بشار الحلبي 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @JenniferJJacobs : "Though Mr. Khamenei was gravely wounded, he is mentally sharp and engaged, according to four senior Iranian officials familiar with his health. One leg was operated on three times, and he is awaiting a prosthetic. He had surgery on one hand and is slowly regaining function. His face and lips have been burned severely, making it difficult for him to speak, the officials said, adding that, eventually, he will need plastic surgery," NYT's @farnazfassihi reports A New Era and New Leadership: The Generals Who Are Running Iran. The killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei ushered in a new form of collective leadership in the country, with more power for the Revolutionary Guards. My story: https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/23/world/middleeast/iran-new-leadership-generals.html?unlocked_article_code=1.dFA.A4OG.lm03nggj0xgx&smid=tw-share - Farnaz Fassihi tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）转发 @JenniferJJacobs：“据四位熟悉哈梅内伊健康状况的伊朗高级官员称，尽管哈梅内伊先生受了重伤，但他精神敏锐且积极参与事务。一条腿接受了三次手术，他正在等待假肢。他的一只手接受了手术，正在缓慢恢复功能。官员们说，他的脸和嘴唇被严重烧伤，导致说话困难，并补充说，最终他将需要整形手术，”《纽约时报》的 @farnazfassihi 报道。新时代与新领导层：管理伊朗的将军们。阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊的遇刺开启了该国一种新的集体领导形式，革命卫队获得了更多权力。我的报道：https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/23/world/middleeast/iran-new-leadership-generals.html?unlocked_article_code=1.dFA.A4OG.lm03nggj0xgx&smid=tw-share - Farnaz Fassihi 推文

text: 📝 Бои на северном фланге 📝 На Восточно-Запорожском направлении воины-дальневосточники постепенно оттесняют противника из окрестностей Александрограда . Долгое время на участке сохранялось «информационное затишье», однако недавно стало известно о новых атаках ВС РФ в сторону реки Волчьей . Наиболее тяжелые бои здесь идут на левом берегу реки Волчья , ВСУ стремятся не допустить закрепления российских подразделений на той его части, что примыкает к заказнику «Новопавловский лес» . Тем не менее штурмовикам удается форсировать водную преграду в нескольких местах и постепенно накапливаться в лесном массиве, развивая атаки в сторону Лесного . ➡️ Освобождение этого населенного пункта не только позволит сформировать устойчивый плацдарм на правом берегу Волчьей , но и обеспечит подразделениям ГВ «Восток» огневой контроль над путями снабжения украинских формирований в заказнике «Дибровский» . Именно здесь расположены критически важные для обороны Большемихайловки позиции ВСУ, утрата которых будет означать попадание гарнизона населенного пункта в «огневой мешок». ➡️ На центральном участке направления российские войска ведут перепроверку прилегающих к фронту лесополос и населенных пунктов с целью выявления и уничтожения разрозненных групп просачивания противника. Параллельно с этим передовые подразделения стремятся оттеснить ВСУ из района Терноватого с целью расширить вклинение в порядки украинских формирований на этом участке. ➡️ На западном фланге продолжаются бои на окраинах Верхней Терсы и Воздвижевки . В то же время российские войска постепенно продвигаются на запад вдоль одноименной реки с целью установить огневой контроль над переправами противника у Копаней и атакуют у Гуляйпольского . 📌 После нескольких месяцев изнурительных боев стало очевидно, что украинские атаки окончательно истощились, не достигнув значимого результата. Штурмовики смогли отбить большинство позиций, утерянных во время контрнаступления противника, в то время как на других участках фронта ВС РФ воспользовались ослабленной обороной ВСУ и продолжили продвижение вперед. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #Гуляйполе #дайджест #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 北翼战斗 📝 在东扎波罗热方向，远东战士正逐渐将敌军从亚历山德罗格勒周边地区击退。该地区长期保持“信息静默”，但最近有消息称俄军向沃尔恰河方向发起了新一轮进攻。这里最激烈的战斗发生在沃尔恰河左岸，乌克兰武装部队试图阻止俄罗斯部队在靠近“新帕夫洛夫斯克森林”保护区的河岸部分立足。尽管如此，突击部队还是成功在多处强渡了水障，并逐渐在森林地带集结，向列斯诺耶方向推进。 ➡️ 解放该定居点不仅可以形成一个稳固的沃尔恰河右岸桥头堡，还将使“东方”部队集群能够对乌克兰军队在“迪布罗夫斯基”保护区的补给线实施火力控制。这里正是乌克兰武装部队防御博利舍米哈伊洛夫卡的关键阵地，一旦失守，该定居点的守军将陷入“火力包围圈”。 ➡️ 在该方向的中段，俄罗斯军队正在对前线附近的林带和定居点进行重新排查，旨在发现并消灭敌方零星的渗透小组。与此同时，前沿部队正试图将乌克兰武装部队从捷尔诺瓦托耶地区挤出，以扩大在该地段对乌军防线的楔入深度。 ➡️ 在西翼，上捷尔萨和沃兹德维任卡郊区的战斗仍在继续。与此同时，俄罗斯军队正沿着同名河流向西逐渐推进，旨在对科帕尼附近的敌方渡口实施火力控制，并对古利亚伊波列附近发起进攻。 📌 经过数月的艰苦战斗，显而易见，乌克兰的进攻已彻底耗尽，未能取得显著成果。突击部队成功夺回了在敌方反攻期间失去的大部分阵地，而在前线的其他地段，俄罗斯武装部队利用乌克兰武装部队防御薄弱的机会继续向前推进。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您所在部队的战果，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 联系我们。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #古利亚伊波列 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ 俄语 | ✈ 英语 | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们
